original_image_tags: A scanned document, appears to be the reverse side of a teletype or cable form. The paper is pinkish/red with two hole-punch marks at the top. There is a faint "ghosting" or bleed-through of text typed on the other side, making the primary visible text appear reversed and difficult to read. Several stamped markings are present in blue and red ink.

elements.description: A pink document page containing multiple ink stamps and faint, reversed typed text. Stamps include: 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT AUG 6 4 22 PM '47', 'F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'RECEIVED INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. AUG 7 10 26 AM', and 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. AUG 26 11 07 AM'. There are two black hole-punch marks at the top.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the pinkish document with two hole-punch marks, reversed bleed-through text, and ink stamps, but Description B provides specific stamp text details that Description A does not, without contradiction.
